nodes.name: Yellow-browed melidectes
nodes.summary: Yellow-browed melidectes（Melidectes rufocrissalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-browed melidectes。

nodes.name: Yellow-browed melidectes
nodes.summary: The yellow-browed melidectes (Melidectes rufocrissalis), also known as the yellow-browed honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found mainly in Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References External links Melidectes rufocrissalis on the Global Biodiversity Information Facility
